command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Confirm gateway stopped ==="
systemctl is-active hermes-gateway 2>/dev/null || echo "stopped (good)"

echo "=== Clear webhook to reset rate limit ==="
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/deleteWebhook?drop_pending_updates=true"
echo ""

echo "=== Verify model is llama3.2 (not qwen3.5) ==="
grep -E "default:|default_model:" /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml | head -3

echo "=== Verify telegram config (require_mention:false) ==="
grep -A6 "^telegram:" /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml

echo "=== Verify RestartSec=600 in service file ==="
grep "RestartSec" /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service

echo "=== Confirm llama3.2 is loaded/fast on Windows ollama ==="
curl -s http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/tags | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('llama3.2 available:', any('llama3.2' in m['name'] for m in d.get('models',[])))" 2>/dev/null

echo "=== Clear old hermes log ==="
> /tmp/hermes.log
echo "log cleared"
REMOTE
